exam_traps.trap: SIMULATED_DATA_SHARING_CONSUMER validates what consumers see -- not reader accounts or row access policies
exam_traps.why_confusing: To test that a secure view shows correct data per consumer, set the session parameter SIMULATED_DATA_SHARING_CONSUMER. Creating reader accounts or row access policies are NOT the recommended validation method.

exam_traps.trap: Data sharing is free for same-region, same-cloud. Cross-region/cross-cloud requires replication.
exam_traps.why_confusing: Direct shares work only within the same cloud and region. For cross-region or cross-cloud sharing, you must replicate the database first, then share from the replicated copy. This adds replication costs.
exam_traps.correct_answer: Same region = direct share (free). Cross-region = replicate then share.

questions.question: Which objects can be included in a Snowflake share? (Choose three.)
questions.overall_explanation: Shares can include tables, secure views, secure materialized views, and secure UDFs. Stored procedures, stages, streams, tasks, and pipes cannot be shared directly.

questions.question: Which of the following CANNOT be shared using Snowflake Secure Data Sharing? (Choose two.)
questions.overall_explanation: Transient tables and stages cannot be shared. Shares support regular tables, secure views, secure materialized views, and secure UDFs. Temporary tables also cannot be shared.
